description: Public release remains blocked until productization readiness review closes all release blockers.
Host permissions require final release justification before public publication.
Provider and runtime paths must remain disabled unless a dedicated provider/runtime release gate approves them.
Current evidence target is 127.0.0.1; IPv6 ::1 remains a caveat and does not block current local evidence gate.
Legacy provider prompt naming debt must be reviewed before provider release.
requiredMilestone: Provider Runtime Release Gate / BYOK Consent Review
